Zyrcon Labs

Your license is ready

Thank you for your purchase, {{customer_name}}!

Your Cascadia OS license is active and ready to install. Everything you need is in this email — keep it somewhere safe.

License Details

Tier {{tier}}
License Key
{{license_key}}

Installation Instructions

1

Download and install Cascadia OS

curl -fsSL https://zyrcon.ai/install.sh | bash
2

Add your license key to config.json

Open ~/Zyrcon/cascadia-os/config.json and set "license_key" to the key shown above.

3

Restart Cascadia OS

bash ~/Zyrcon/cascadia-os/stop.sh && bash ~/Zyrcon/cascadia-os/start.sh
4

Open the PRISM dashboard

Visit http://localhost:6300 in your browser. Your license tier will be shown in the header.

Documentation | Support | Community

Questions? Reply to this email or reach us at support@zyrcon.ai
